Id1.text: World War II had Chiang Kai-shek as a commander and United States Army soldier Abner W. Sibal.

Id2.text: Abner W. Sibal served in the United States Army during the Second World War and during that war Chiang Kai-shek was one of the commanders.

Id3.text: Abner W. Sibal, served in the United States Army and fought in World War II, one of the commanders of which, was Chiang Kai-shek.

gold_outputs: Abner W. Sibal served in the United States Army during the Second World War and during that war Chiang Kai-shek was one of the commanders.
Abner W. Sibal, served in the United States Army and fought in World War II, one of the commanders of which, was Chiang Kai-shek.
World War II had Chiang Kai-shek as a commander and United States Army soldier Abner W. Sibal.
